mapper.select: SELECT cb.*, cc.category_name, cc.icon_code FROM CARD_BENEFITS cb LEFT JOIN CARD_CATEGORIES cc ON cb.category_id = cc.category_id WHERE cb.card_id = #{cardId} AND cb.visible_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY cb.display_order ASC NULLS LAST
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CARD_BENEFITS ( card_id, category_id, benefit_title, benefit_type, discount_rate, discount_amount, point_rate, cashback_rate, monthly_limit_amount, daily_limit_amount, minimum_payment_amount, display_text, display_order, visible_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{benefitTitle}, #{benefitType}, #{discountRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{discountAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pointRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cashbackRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{monthlyLimitAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dailyLimitAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{minimumPaymentAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{displayText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'Y', SYSTIMESTAMP )
